summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of the LandSecure landing page. All sections render correctly with proper content, navigation works smoothly, mobile responsiveness is functional, and the Apple-style dark theme is consistently applied throughout.
passed_tests: Hero section renders with 'End Land Fraud Forever.' heading and CTA buttons
Navbar is sticky with glassmorphism effect and all navigation links
Problem section shows all 4 stat cards (60%, $3.5B, 70%, 2.5x) in bento grid
Features section has all 5 feature cards (Blockchain Security, Biometric Authentication, AI Fraud Detection, GIS Mapping, QR Verification)
How It Works section displays 4 timeline steps with vertical line
Impact section shows 3 cards with correct stats (100%, 10x, 99.7%)
Business Model section has 4 revenue stream cards
SWOT section displays 4 glass cards (Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, Threats)
Target Users section lists 4 user types
Team section shows 4 team member cards with circular avatars
Final CTA section with 'Secure Land. Secure Future.' and buttons
Footer section with product links, company links, resources, legal
Mobile responsive - navbar has hamburger menu on small screens
All sections have proper data-testid attributes
Smooth scroll works when clicking nav links
All buttons are clickable and functional
